commit_scope: Promote native route goal state into Form cells and normalize web health proxy pressure to its upstream native route

commands: cd web && npm run test -- tests/health-proxy-route-goal.test.ts
local_validation.summary: The route goal loop now writes a cell_surface pointer and Form can read docs/system_audit/native_route_goal_state.json as route-goal cells. The web health proxy now emits runtime telemetry as endpoint=/api/health and raw_endpoint=/api/health-proxy, while the route-goal loop also normalizes pre-existing health-proxy observations to the upstream native route. The refreshed web_api window has 47 events on GET /api/health, 100% high-grammar-native share, 100% native-executable share, no promotion candidate, and next_action=observe-next-route-window.

known_failed_attempts.output: Failed because this linked worktree does not have api/.venv/bin/pytest. Reran with system pytest: cd api && python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_runtime_web_api_provenance.py.

Initial collection failed because the test imported scripts/native_route_goal_loop.py with importlib without inserting the module into sys.modules before dataclass decoration. Fixed the test harness by assigning sys.modules[NATIVE_ROUTE_GOAL_LOOP_SPEC.name] before exec_module.

ci_validation.reason: No commit, push, or PR was created in this turn.

phase_gate.reason: Local proof passed, but CI and production deploy validation remain pending until the work is committed, pushed, and shipped.

evidence_refs: form/form-stdlib/native-route-goal-cells.fk defines route-goal state, route, task, and summary cells with accessors and aggregate counts, including an explicit target-satisfied state.
form/form-stdlib/tests/native-route-goal-cells-band.fk proves the real docs/system_audit/native_route_goal_state.json is readable as cells and internally consistent.
form/form-stdlib/queries/native-route-goal-tending.fk exposes the Rust-kernel route-goal summary through make native-route-goal-tending.
web/app/api/health-proxy/route.ts now records web_api runtime events against /api/health with raw_endpoint=/api/health-proxy, so proxy shell traffic does not become a false backend promotion target.
scripts/native_route_goal_loop.py honors upstream_endpoint/route_goal_endpoint metadata and normalizes pre-existing web health proxy events to GET /api/health.
docs/system_audit/native_route_goal_state.json now reports next_action=observe-next-route-window, next_route=null, and GET /api/health as kernel-native-high-grammar for the current web_api window.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The native route promotion goal is no longer only a static JSON artifact, and the current web health proxy no longer appears as a false non-native backend promotion candidate; route-goal pressure lands on the already-BML GET /api/health route.
test_flows: python3 scripts/native_route_goal_loop.py /loop --source web_api --seconds 86400 --limit 2000 --write-state reports 100.00% high-grammar native share and no next route.
cd api && python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_runtime_web_api_provenance.py returns 3 passed.
cd web && npm run test -- tests/health-proxy-route-goal.test.ts returns 1 passed file, 2 passed tests.
cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/native-route-goal-cells.fk form-stdlib/tests/native-route-goal-cells-band.fk returns 16383 and 1 ok, 0 divergent.
make native-route-goal-tending returns a NRG-TAG-SUMMARY row with goal_native_share=1.0, native_executable_share=1.0, and route-goal coverage target satisfied.

known_runtime_context.current_live_pressure: The refreshed production web_api window contains 47 events, all attributed to GET /api/health after normalization, with 1.0 high-grammar-native share and 1.0 native-executable share.
known_runtime_context.health_direction: Keep /goal and /loop as live route-goal cell memory. The JSON state is now an edge lens, while native_route_goal_cells is the Form surface that later BML/domain grammar promotion loops should query.
known_runtime_context.next_promotion_candidate: No web_api route promotion candidate is present in the current observation window. The next move is to collect fresh web navigation traffic or run /goal against source=api for backend promotion pressure.
